data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for exportable engagement analytics.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Exportable engagement analytics'. However, the prior evidence does not provide any concrete data or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of this feature. While the linked use case mentions the need for exportable engagement analytics, there is no corresponding evidence to support its implementation or availability.
gaps: No evidence of exportable engagement analytics mechanisms.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
